query_en: How do I act without being attached to results?
query_hi: मैं फल की चिंता किए बिना कर्म कैसे करूं?

query_en: Should I do my duty even if I don't see any results?

query_hi: भगवद गीता में समभाव का क्या अर्थ है?

query_en: I feel stressed and anxious about everything in life

query_hinglish: Main har cheez ke baare mein pareshaan aur anxious feel karta hoon

query_hinglish: Mujhe bahut jaldi gussa aata hai, kaise control karu?

query_hi: गीता इच्छा के बारे में क्या कहती है और इसे कैसे जीतें?
query_hinglish: Gita desire aur kaam ke baare mein kya kehti hai?

query_en: Explain how desire leads to destruction according to the Gita

query_hinglish: Gita ke anusar desire se destruction kaise hoti hai?

query_en: I feel very angry with someone, what should I do?
query_hi: मुझे किसी पर बहुत गुस्सा आ रहा है, मुझे क्या करना चाहिए?
query_hinglish: Kisi par bahut gussa aa raha hai, gusse mein kya karu?

query_en: How does craving and attachment lead to suffering?
query_hi: लालसा और आसक्ति दुख का कारण कैसे बनती है?

query_en: Where should a meditator sit and what should they focus on?

query_hinglish: Meditator ko kahan baithna chahiye aur kya focus karna chahiye?

query_hinglish: Mann bahut chanchal hai, dhyan mein kaise sthir karu?

query_hinglish: Gita mrityu aur atma ki amarta ke baare mein kya kehti hai?

query_hinglish: Mera dost mar gaya, main toot gaya hoon

query_hinglish: Atma jnana kya hai aur sorrow overcome karne mein kaise help karta hai?

query_hinglish: Krishna ke anusar gyani insaan mein kya qualities hoti hain?

query_hi: स्थितप्रज्ञ की विशेषताओं का वर्णन करें

query_hinglish: Complete surrender aur devotion to God ka matlab kya hai Gita mein?

query_hinglish: Main bahut akela feel karta hoon, koi nahi samjhta

query_hinglish: Ghar mein bahut jhagda hota hai, parivaar mein problem hai, kya karu?

query_hinglish: Meri zindagi ka maqsad kya hai, main yahan kisliye aya hoon?

query_hi: जीवन का उद्देश्य क्या है?

query_en: How to overcome the fear of death?
